title: Multi-Party RSVP
instruction: You are organizing a team lunch. Your original email (subject "Team Lunch — Date Poll") lists three proposed dates: April 4, April 11, April 18. It also names 5 required attendees: Marcus Rivera, Sofia Kim, Theo Patel, Elena Brooks, and Nina Garcia. Three others (Jordan Wright, Miles Chen, Priya Morris) are optional. Responses arrived across 4 threads. Read every response to find the one date where all 5 required attendees can attend. Note: Sofia Kim initially replied "April 11 works" but sent a correction later in the same thread saying "Sorry, April 11 conflict came up — only April 4 works for me now." Collect all dietary restrictions mentioned in any response. Compose a new email to team.lunch@ops.test with subject "Team Lunch Confirmed" containing the confirmed date as "Date: April 4" and a "Dietary notes:" section listing each person's restriction as '{name}: {restriction}' on separate lines. After sending, star the most recent email in each of the 4 RSVP threads and archive the original poll email.
eval_check_descriptions: Email sent to team lunch address

emails.subject: Agenda draft for Monday check-in
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

The team is aligned on the main path and only needs confirmation on the follow-up items. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: Notes from the partner sync
emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. Happy to consolidate comments if more feedback comes in.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Revised budget worksheet
emails.body:
I pulled the loose ends into one note for easier review.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Re: Team Lunch — Date Poll
emails.body:
Any date works! I have a nut allergy though.

Thanks,
Priya

emails.subject: Re: Team Lunch — Date Poll
emails.body:
April 11 only.

Thanks,
Miles

emails.subject: Re: Team Lunch — Date Poll
emails.body:
April 4 or April 11 for me.

Thanks,
Nina

emails.subject: Re: Team Lunch — Date Poll
emails.body:
April 4 or April 18. I'm gluten-free, please keep that in mind.

Thanks,
Elena

emails.subject: Re: Team Lunch — Date Poll
emails.body:
Sorry, April 11 conflict came up — only April 4 works for me now.

Thanks,
Sofia

emails.subject: Fwd: Re: Team Lunch — Date Poll
emails.body:
FYI Miles — Sofia said April 11 works, so that's looking like the winner.

---------- Forwarded message ----------

From: Sofia Kim <sofia.kim@ops.test>
Subject: Re: Team Lunch — Date Poll

April 11 works for me!

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.body:

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: Team Lunch — Date Poll
emails.body:
Hi team,

I'd like to organize a team lunch. Here are three proposed dates:
- April 4
- April 11
- April 18

Required attendees: Marcus Rivera, Sofia Kim, Theo Patel, Elena Brooks, Nina Garcia.

Optional: Jordan Wright, Miles Chen, Priya Morris.

Please reply with which dates work for you and mention any dietary restrictions.

Thanks,
Avery
